description: Visitor-visible chat line (**user** or **assistant**). Returned in `messages` from `POST /v3/clientportal/chat/sessions` when a session is **resumed**, and stored inside `ChatTranscriptDocument` for persisted conversations. System prompts and internal tool rows are not included.

at.description: Optional ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the server recorded the turn. May be omitted on older Redis session blobs; clients may use it for ordering or display outside the embeddable widget.

example.content: Hi! How can I help you today?
